Title: Create a new user
Test Data:
- Valid user details (name, surname, email, neighborhood)
- Invalid user details (missing fields, invalid email format)
Test Steps:
1. Request user creation with valid details.
2. Check if the user creation process is initiated.
3. Verify that the user is created successfully.
4. Request user creation with invalid details.
5. Verify that the user creation fails due to invalid input.
Expected Result:
- A new user is created with valid details.
- An error message is displayed for invalid user details.

Title: Authenticate a user
Test Data:
- Valid credentials (email, password)
- Invalid credentials (wrong email, wrong password)
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to authenticate with valid credentials.
2. Verify that the authentication process is successful.
3. Attempt to authenticate with invalid credentials.
4. Verify that the authentication fails.
Expected Result:
- Successful authentication with valid credentials.
- Failed authentication with invalid credentials.

Title: Verify user localization
Test Data:
- Valid location data
- Invalid location data
Test Steps:
1. Proceed to localization verification with valid location data.
2. Verify that the localization process completes successfully.
3. Proceed to localization verification with invalid location data.
4. Verify that the localization process fails and repeats until valid data is provided.
Expected Result:
- Successful localization with valid location data.
- Repeated localization verification with invalid location data until valid data is entered.

Title: Navigate from home screen
Test Data:
- Clicking on profile photo
- Clicking on notification icon
- Interacting with the map
- Interacting with the menu
Test Steps:
1. Click on the profile photo from the home screen.
2. Verify navigation to the profile page.
3. Click on the notification icon from the home screen.
4. Verify navigation to the notification section.
5. Interact with the map from the home screen.
6. Verify navigation to the full screen map.
7. Interact with the menu from the home screen.
8. Verify navigation to the menu interaction.
9. Click on the home icon from the menu interaction.
10. Verify navigation back to the home screen.
11. Click on the personal profile icon from the menu interaction.
12. Verify navigation to the profile page.
13. Click on the chat icon from the menu interaction.
14. Verify navigation to the chat section.
15. Click on the general access icon from the chat section.
16. Verify navigation to the general dashboard.
Expected Result: - Correct navigation based on user actions from the home screen.

Title: Interact with a post
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the general dashboard.
2. Select a specific post.
3. Load related comments.
4. Open the full screen view of the post.
5. Add a comment to the post.
6. Save the comment.
7. Verify that the comment is saved and displayed in the full screen post view.
Expected Result:
- Successful loading and display of comments.
- Successful addition and saving of a comment.

Title: Search and interact with profiles
Test Data:
- Resident profile search
- Business profile search
- Adding to contacts
- Viewing unsold items
- Booking an appointment
Test Steps:
1. Perform a search for a resident profile.
2. Verify navigation to the resident profile.
3. Attempt to add the resident to contacts.
4. Verify navigation to the chat interface.
5. Perform a search for a business profile.
6. Verify navigation to the business profile.
7. View unsold items from the business profile.
8. Verify navigation to the view unsold items section.
9. View promotions from the business profile.
10. Verify navigation to the view promotions section.
11. Book an appointment from the business profile.
12. Verify navigation to the calendar interface.
13. Confirm the booking operation.
14. Verify successful confirmation of the booking.
Expected Result: - Correct navigation and interaction based on the type of profile searched.

Title: Associate a comment with a post
Test Data:
- Valid comment details (content)
- Invalid comment details (empty content)
Test Steps:
1. Create a new comment with valid details.
2. Verify that the comment is associated with the correct post.
3. Attempt to create a comment with invalid details.
4. Verify that the comment creation fails due to invalid input.
Expected Result:
- Successful association of a valid comment with a post.
- Failure to associate an invalid comment with a post.

Title: Inherit properties from User to BusinessUser
Test Data:
- BusinessUser details (companyName, companyDescription)
- Regular User details (name, surname, email)
Test Steps:
1. Create a BusinessUser with valid details.
2. Verify that the BusinessUser inherits all properties from the User class.
3. Create a regular User with valid details.
4. Verify that the regular User does not inherit additional properties from the BusinessUser class.
Expected Result:
- BusinessUser inherits all properties from the User class.
- Regular User does not inherit additional properties from the BusinessUser class.

Title: Associate a chat list with a user
Test Data:
- Valid chat list details (chatList)
- Invalid chat list details (empty chatList)
Test Steps:
1. Create a new chat list with valid details.
2. Verify that the chat list is associated with the correct user.
3. Attempt to create a chat list with invalid details.
4. Verify that the chat list creation fails due to invalid input.
Expected Result:
- Successful association of a valid chat list with a user.
- Failure to associate an invalid chat list with a user.

Title: Associate a neighborhood with a user
Test Data:
- Valid neighborhood details (googleCode)
- Invalid neighborhood details (empty googleCode)
Test Steps:
1. Create a new neighborhood association with valid details.
2. Verify that the neighborhood is associated with the correct user.
3. Attempt to create a neighborhood association with invalid details.
4. Verify that the neighborhood association fails due to invalid input.
Expected Result:
- Successful association of a valid neighborhood with a user.
- Failure to associate an invalid neighborhood with a user.

Test Data:
- Valid comment details (content)
- Invalid comment details (empty content)

3. Load related comments.
4. Open the full screen view of the post.

Title: Book an appointment
Test Data:
- Valid appointment details (date, time)
- Invalid appointment details (incorrect date format)
Test Steps:
1. Search for a business profile.
2. Navigate to the business profile.
3. Book an appointment with valid details.
4. Verify that the appointment is booked successfully.
5. Book an appointment with invalid details.
6. Verify that the appointment booking fails due to invalid input.
Expected Result:
- Successful booking of a valid appointment.
- Failure to book an invalid appointment.

Title: View promotions
Test Steps:
1. Search for a business profile.
2. Navigate to the business profile.
3. View promotions from the business profile.
4. Verify that the promotions are displayed correctly.

Title: View unsold items
Test Steps:
1. Search for a business profile.
2. Navigate to the business profile.
3. View unsold items from the business profile.
4. Verify that the unsold items are displayed correctly.

Title: Write operation to the database
Test Steps:
1. Search for a business profile.
2. Navigate to the business profile.
3. Book an appointment with valid details.
4. Wait for the database write operation to complete.
5. Verify that the booking is confirmed successfully.
Expected Result: - Successful database write operation and confirmation of the booking.

Title: Complete user creation flow
Test Data:
- Valid user details (name, surname, email, neighborhood)
- Invalid user details (missing fields, invalid email format)
Test Steps:
1. Start the user creation process.
2. Provide valid user details.
3. Verify that the user is created successfully.
4. Provide invalid user details.
5. Verify that the user creation fails due to invalid input.
6. Attempt to authenticate with valid credentials.
7. Verify that the authentication process is successful.
8. Attempt to authenticate with invalid credentials.
9. Verify that the authentication fails.
Expected Result:
- Successful user creation and authentication with valid details.
- Failure in user creation and authentication with invalid details.

Title: Navigate between profile sections
Test Data: - Clicking on different icons (home, profile, chat)
Test Steps:
1. Click on the home icon from the profile page.
2. Verify navigation back to the home screen.
3. Click on the personal profile icon from the home screen.
4. Verify navigation to the profile page.
5. Click on the chat icon from the home screen.
6. Verify navigation to the chat section.
7. Click on the general access icon from the chat section.
8. Verify navigation to the general dashboard.
Expected Result: - Correct navigation based on user actions from the profile page.
